tasks.subject: MZ Task 1: TOML schema + migrate Python tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move the profile intermediate XML->TOML; migrate mode2-profile.py (derive writes .toml, compile reads via tomllib).

**Files:** Modify tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.py, tests/host/079_mode2_profile_derive.sh, tests/host/080_mode2_profile_compile.sh.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/079_mode2_profile_derive.sh && bash tests/host/080_mode2_profile_compile.sh -> both PASS

Full code in plan doc MZ Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.py", "tests/host/079_mode2_profile_derive.sh", "tests/host/080_mode2_profile_compile.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/079_mode2_profile_derive.sh && bash tests/host/080_mode2_profile_compile.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["derive writes flat TOML with all 8 keys + provenance comment", "compile parses via tomllib, validates, packs 120-byte binary, rejects malformed/unknown/out-of-range", "tests 079 + 080 pass against TOML"]}
```

tasks.subject: MZ Task 2: C mode2-profile tool — scaffold + compile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Multi-platform C mode2-profile tool — Makefile (host+android), vendored tomlc99, the compile subcommand.

**Files:** Create tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.c, tools/mode2-profile/Makefile, tools/mode2-profile/vendor/tomlc99/{toml.c,toml.h}, tests/host/082_mode2_profile_parity.sh.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/082_mode2_profile_parity.sh -> PASS: 082 mode2-profile parity

Full code in plan doc MZ Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.c", "tools/mode2-profile/Makefile", "tools/mode2-profile/vendor/tomlc99/toml.c", "tools/mode2-profile/vendor/tomlc99/toml.h", "tests/host/082_mode2_profile_parity.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/082_mode2_profile_parity.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["make builds host + android binaries", "compile output byte-identical to Python tool; rejects malformed/out-of-range", "tests/host/082 passes (compile half)"]}
```

tasks.subject: MZ Task 3: C mode2-profile — derive subcommand
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement derive in the C tool — a plain-C AVB vbmeta reader producing the .toml, byte-identical to the Python tool.

**Files:** Modify tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.c, tools/mode2-profile/Makefile, tests/host/082_mode2_profile_parity.sh.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/082_mode2_profile_parity.sh -> PASS: 082 mode2-profile parity

Full spec in plan doc MZ Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/mode2-profile/mode2-profile.c", "tools/mode2-profile/Makefile", "tests/host/082_mode2_profile_parity.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/082_mode2_profile_parity.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["derive .toml byte-identical to Python tool for the same vbmeta", "aborts non-zero on unreadable/too-small/unsigned/descriptor-less vbmeta", "tests/host/082 passes incl. derive parity"]}
```

tasks.subject: MZ Task 4: abl-patcher --oem runtime scope selection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Runtime-selectable host patch aggregation so abl-patcher applies universal+oem (mode-2) vs universal+mode_1+oem (mode-1).

**Files:** Create GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/PatchScope.h, tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh; Modify GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/PatchTable.c, tools/abl-patcher/abl-patcher.c, tools/abl-patcher/Makefile.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh -> PASS: 083 abl-patcher oem

Full code in plan doc MZ Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/PatchScope.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/PatchTable.c", "tools/abl-patcher/abl-patcher.c", "tools/abl-patcher/Makefile", "tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["abl-patcher --oem oneplus --no-mode1 applies universal+oneplus not mode_1; plain abl-patcher still applies mode_1", "unknown --oem exits non-zero clearly", "tests 060/062/045 still pass", "tests/host/083 passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: MZ Task 5: factor shared loader-ABL machinery into zip/core/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move install.sh's loader-ABL functions into a zip/core/ library both install.sh and profile.sh source — behaviour-preserving refactor. (zip/ is a submodule.)

**Files:** Create zip/core/install_abl.sh; Modify zip/modes/install.sh, zip/META-INF/com/google/android/update-binary.

**Verify:** bash scripts/build-recovery-zip.sh --mode install -> ==> dist/gbl-chainload-install.zip

Full detail in plan doc MZ Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zip/core/install_abl.sh", "zip/modes/install.sh", "zip/META-INF/com/google/android/update-binary"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/build-recovery-zip.sh --mode install", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loader-ABL functions moved to zip/core/install_abl.sh; install.sh sources it, behaviour unchanged", "build-recovery-zip.sh --mode install still assembles", "shellcheck clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: MZ Task 6: the profile mode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement zip/modes/profile.{sh,conf} — the mode-2 installer body. (zip/ is a submodule.)

**Files:** Modify zip/modes/profile.conf, zip/modes/profile.sh.

**Verify:** sh -n zip/modes/profile.sh exits 0; shellcheck --shell=sh zip/modes/profile.sh clean.

Full code in plan doc MZ Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zip/modes/profile.conf", "zip/modes/profile.sh"], "verifyCommand": "sh -n zip/modes/profile.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["profile.conf declares mode-2.efi / efisp abl / the 5 tools", "profile.sh mode_main runs detect-OEM->preflight->derive/compile->OEM-patched cache ABL->gbl-pack->concat->commit EFISP+loader ABL; aborts before any write on bad OEM / missing stock_vbmeta", "sh -n and shellcheck clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: MZ Task 7: vendor mode2-profile + mode-2.efi, assemble profile ZIP
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the C tool + mode-2 base EFI into the recovery-tool build and ZIP vendoring; assemble gbl-chainload-profile.zip.

**Files:** Modify scripts/build-recovery-tools.sh, zip/update-tools.sh (zip submodule).

**Verify:** bash scripts/build-recovery-zip.sh --mode profile -> ==> dist/gbl-chainload-profile.zip

Full detail in plan doc MZ Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/build-recovery-tools.sh", "zip/update-tools.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/build-recovery-zip.sh --mode profile", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build-recovery-tools.sh builds mode2-profile aarch64", "update-tools.sh vendors mode2-profile + mode-2.efi + MANIFEST", "build-recovery-zip.sh --mode profile assembles the ZIP with the new artifacts; skew checks pass"]}
```
